title: Minimal Armor HUD
body:
<center>

  A mod that shows your Armor Durability in a minimal fashion.

  Inspired by: [MicroDurability](https://modrinth.com/mod/microdurability). \
  ![Durability HUD Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/48qJvWKS/images/6f3f1a7273224ebd026ef0f4c4188da6ea8e40e3.png)
  
</center>
